---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: ''
labels: ["type: feature", "status: needs-triage"]
assignees: ''
---

**What problem does this solve?**
Describe the use case or workflow this feature enables.

**Proposed solution**
How should this work? Include mockups or references to other EDA tools if helpful.

**Altium reference**
If this feature exists in Altium Designer, describe how Altium implements it
(Altium is the project's UX reference — see [docs/UX_REFERENCE_ALTIUM.md](../../blob/trunk/docs/UX_REFERENCE_ALTIUM.md)).

**Area**
Which part of the app? (e.g. footprint editor, symbol editor, schematic,
library, sketch, ERC, rendering …) — helps us apply the right `area:` label.

**Alternatives considered**
Any alternative approaches you've thought about.

**Milestone**
Which version milestone does this belong to? Check the
[milestones](../../milestones) and the [roadmap](../../blob/trunk/docs/ROADMAP.md).
